localspace_list.name: Collapsed Barn
localspace_list.description: A weathered, partially collapsed barn with a caved-in roof, its wooden walls splintered and overgrown with ivy. The entrance is blocked by debris.

localspace_list.name: Sealed Well
localspace_list.description: A small, stone-lined well covered by a heavy iron grate bolted into the ground. The water below is inaccessible.

localspace_list.name: Flooded Root Cellar
localspace_list.description: A low, stone structure half-sunk into the earth, its door sealed shut and water seeping from cracks in the walls.

localspace_list.name: Chimney Ruin
localspace_list.description: A solitary stone chimney standing amid rubble, the remains of a long-gone cabin. The fireplace opening is bricked up.

localspace_list.name: Blocked Mine Entrance
localspace_list.description: A dark tunnel mouth choked with fallen rocks and timber, the rails leading into it rusted and broken.

localspace_list.name: Crumbled Shed
localspace_list.description: A small wooden shed reduced to a heap of rotting planks and rusted nails, its frame barely recognizable.

localspace_list.name: Locked Tool Shed
localspace_list.description: A tiny, windowless shed with a rusted padlock on its door. The wood is warped and the hinges are seized.

localspace_list.name: Abandoned Stable
localspace_list.description: A roofless stable with three stalls, its walls leaning inward. Hay and old tack rot in the mud inside.

localspace_list.name: Caved-In Cellar
localspace_list.description: A stone stairway descending into darkness, but the cellar below is entirely filled with collapsed earth and rock.

localspace_list.name: Sealed Storm Cellar
localspace_list.description: A concrete hatch set into the ground, bolted from the outside and covered with a thick layer of moss.

localspace_list.name: Old Mill House
localspace_list.description: A two-story wooden mill with a working waterwheel, the interior dusty but intact. Two figures move quietly among the sacks of grain.

localspace_list.name: Watchman's Post
localspace_list.description: A cramped, single-room lookout tower with narrow windows. Two people stand at the windows, scanning the surrounding woods.

localspace_list.name: Bricked-Up Outhouse
localspace_list.description: A small outhouse with its door nailed shut and the interior filled with bricks and mortar.

localspace_list.name: Fallen Bell Tower
localspace_list.description: A wooden bell tower that has toppled sideways, its bell half-buried in the dirt. The structure is unsafe to enter.

localspace_list.name: Grand Lumber Mill
localspace_list.description: A vast, multi-story lumber mill with high ceilings, long conveyor belts, and stacks of timber. The machinery is silent and the space feels cavernous.

localspace_list.name: Locked Icehouse
localspace_list.description: A small, thick-walled stone building with a heavy iron door, sealed tight. Frost clings to the exterior cracks.

localspace_list.name: Abandoned Blacksmithy
localspace_list.description: A three-room forge with a collapsed chimney, its anvil and tools rusting under a sagging roof. The entrance is blocked by a fallen beam.

localspace_list.name: Sealed Cistern
localspace_list.description: A tiny, domed stone structure with a locked iron hatch. No water sound comes from within.

localspace_list.name: Deserted Carpenter's Workshop
localspace_list.description: A four-room workshop filled with workbenches and half-finished furniture, all coated in dust. The windows are boarded shut.

localspace_list.name: Sprawling Grain Silo Complex
localspace_list.description: A large complex of interconnected silos and processing sheds, with catwalks and chutes. The metal walls echo with every step.

localspace_list.name: Sealed Smokehouse
localspace_list.description: A tiny, windowless shack with a heavy wooden door barred from the outside. Smoke stains darken the eaves.

localspace_list.name: Vast Hayloft and Stable
localspace_list.description: A sprawling, nine-room stable with towering haylofts and multiple stalls. The air is thick with the smell of old hay and dust.

localspace_list.name: Mill Pond Overlook
localspace_list.description: A small wooden platform extending over the mill pond, offering a view of the old water wheel. Benches line the edges, and the air smells of damp wood and still water.

localspace_list.name: Riverside Storage Shed
localspace_list.description: A modest, weathered shed near the riverbank, filled with coils of rope, old fishing nets, and stacked barrels. Dusty light filters through a single grimy window.

localspace_list.name: Millworker's Rest Area
localspace_list.description: A small, sheltered alcove with a few wooden crates used as seats. A cold fireplace stands against one wall, and a faded notice board hangs nearby.

localspace_list.name: Tiny Gear Room
localspace_list.description: A cramped chamber dominated by a single, rusted iron gear as tall as a person. The walls are slick with condensation, and the floor is gritty with metal shavings.

localspace_list.name: Watchman's Niche
localspace_list.description: A narrow, closet-like space with a single high window. A wooden stool and a dusty lantern sit on the floor, and the walls are covered in old tally marks.

localspace_list.name: Storage Cubby
localspace_list.description: A tiny, dusty alcove barely large enough to turn around in. Shelves hold a few chipped ceramic jars and a tangle of old twine.

localspace_list.name: Main Mill Floor
localspace_list.description: A broad, open space filled with the skeletons of milling machinery. Tall windows let in pale light, illuminating the thick dust that coats every surface. The ceiling is high and crossed with heavy beams.

localspace_list.name: Tool Closet
localspace_list.description: A small, cramped closet with hooks on the walls holding rusted wrenches and a broken scythe. A single boot lies forgotten in the corner.

localspace_list.name: Grain Silo Base
localspace_list.description: A small, circular room at the base of a grain silo. The air is thick with the smell of old barley, and a chute in the ceiling is sealed with a heavy iron hatch.

localspace_list.name: The Old Mill Bridge
localspace_list.description: A wide, stone-arched bridge spanning the river, its surface worn smooth by centuries of use. The parapets are low, and the river rushes far below. The bridge is large enough to host small gatherings.

localspace_list.name: Flour Sifting Room
localspace_list.description: A small, dusty room with a series of wooden sifting screens leaning against the walls. A fine layer of flour coats everything, and the air is still and chalky.

localspace_list.name: Cog Nook
localspace_list.description: A tiny, triangular space behind a massive wooden cog. The cog's teeth are visible through gaps in the wall, and the floor is littered with wood shavings.

localspace_list.name: Millwright's Workshop
localspace_list.description: A small workshop with a workbench cluttered with tools, half-finished gears, and oil cans. A vice grips a broken axle, and the walls are lined with pegboards.

localspace_list.name: Hopper Platform
localspace_list.description: A small, elevated platform overlooking the grain hoppers. A wooden railing prevents falls, and the air is filled with the faint, sweet scent of oats.

localspace_list.name: The Millrace Chamber
localspace_list.description: A large, echoing chamber where the millrace churns beneath a grated floor. The walls are slick with moss, and the constant roar of water fills the space. A single figure tends to the sluice gate.

localspace_list.name: Bell Tower Landing
localspace_list.description: A tiny landing at the top of a narrow staircase, with a single rope hanging from a bell above. A small window looks out over the mill pond.

localspace_list.name: Drying Loft
localspace_list.description: A small, warm loft with herbs and grain bundles hanging from the rafters. The wooden floor is worn, and a single lantern casts a soft glow. A person sits quietly among the drying plants.

localspace_list.name: Spout Alcove
localspace_list.description: A tiny alcove where a wooden spout drips water into a stone basin. The walls are green with algae, and the floor is perpetually damp.

localspace_list.name: Sack Storage
localspace_list.description: A small room stacked high with burlap sacks of grain and flour. The air is heavy with dust, and a single person moves between the piles, checking for leaks.

localspace_list.name: Pulley Niche
localspace_list.description: A tiny, wedge-shaped space containing a large wooden pulley and a coil of rope. A person stands nearby, adjusting the tension on the line.

localspace_list.name: Grinding Stone Room
localspace_list.description: A small, circular room housing a pair of massive grinding stones. The stones are still, and a layer of fine grit covers the floor. The walls are scarred from years of use.

localspace_list.name: Canal Lock House
localspace_list.description: A small, stone building beside a canal lock. Inside, a wooden desk holds a logbook and a set of lock keys. The windows look out over the still, green water.

localspace_list.name: Crumbled Watchtower
localspace_list.description: A collapsed stone watchtower, its upper floors reduced to rubble. Vines and moss cover the broken walls, and the entrance is completely blocked by fallen masonry.

localspace_list.name: Flooded Quarry Pit
localspace_list.description: A vast, water-filled quarry depression, its steep walls lined with moss and ferns. The dark water reflects the sky, and the surrounding cliffs show signs of old tool marks.

localspace_list.name: Abandoned Smithy
localspace_list.description: A small, roofless stone building with a rusted anvil and a cold forge. The interior is choked with debris and brambles, and the doorway is partially collapsed.

localspace_list.name: Grand Mill Ruins
localspace_list.description: The expansive remains of a watermill complex, with towering stone arches and a broken wheel half-submerged in the creek. The interior is a maze of collapsed floors and open chambers.

localspace_list.name: Sealed Root Cellar
localspace_list.description: A low, moss-covered mound with a heavy iron door rusted shut. The entrance is buried under earth and tangled roots, making entry impossible.

localspace_list.name: Tumbledown Shed
localspace_list.description: A small wooden shed that has collapsed inward, its roof sagging and walls splintered. Only a few rusted tools are visible through the gaps.

localspace_list.name: Choked Well House
localspace_list.description: A small stone well house with a broken roof. The well inside is clogged with fallen stones and debris, and the door is sealed with heavy planks.

localspace_list.name: Tiny Shrine Niche
localspace_list.description: A compact stone alcove set into a hillside, its interior filled with rubble. A weathered carving of a deer is barely visible above the debris.

localspace_list.name: Overgrown Orchard Grove
localspace_list.description: A large, tangled grove of old fruit trees, their branches heavy with moss and lichen. The ground is uneven with hidden roots and crumbling stone walls.

localspace_list.name: Collapsed Pigsty
localspace_list.description: A small, dilapidated pigsty with a caved-in roof and broken stone walls. The interior is filled with mud and rotting wood.

localspace_list.name: Ruined Cottage
localspace_list.description: A small, roofless cottage with gaping windows and a door hanging by one hinge. Inside, a fireplace is half-buried under fallen plaster.

localspace_list.name: Tiny Storage Hole
localspace_list.description: A cramped, shallow pit lined with rotted planks, now filled with dirt and leaves. The entrance is barely wide enough for a person to peer into.

localspace_list.name: Narrow Well Shaft
localspace_list.description: A narrow, stone-lined well shaft, its opening covered by a rusted grate. The water below is stagnant and choked with debris.

localspace_list.name: Fallen Barn
localspace_list.description: A small barn that has collapsed entirely, its beams and planks forming a jumbled heap. Only a fragment of the roof ridge remains upright.

localspace_list.name: Widow's Walk Ruin
localspace_list.description: A large, two-story stone house with a collapsed upper floor and a sagging porch. The interior is open to the sky, with wildflowers growing through the floorboards.

localspace_list.name: Broken Cart Shed
localspace_list.description: A small shed with a missing wall and a roof that has caved in. The remains of an old cart are visible inside, half-buried in debris.

localspace_list.name: Tiny Springhouse
localspace_list.description: A tiny stone structure over a spring, its door rotted away. The interior is filled with cold, clear water and fallen stones.

localspace_list.name: Compact Icehouse
localspace_list.description: A small, sunken stone chamber with a collapsed roof. The interior is filled with damp earth and the remains of old straw insulation.

localspace_list.name: Abandoned Tavern
localspace_list.description: A large, two-story timber-framed building with a sagging roof and boarded windows. The interior is dark and dusty, with overturned tables and a cold hearth.

localspace_list.name: Crumbled Gatehouse
localspace_list.description: A small gatehouse with a collapsed archway and a missing door. The interior is choked with rubble and the walls are covered in climbing ivy.

localspace_list.name: Quiet Herb Garden
localspace_list.description: A small, walled garden with neat rows of herbs and a single bench. The air is fragrant with rosemary and thyme, and a lone figure tends the plants in silence.

localspace_list.name: Dusty Carpenter's Workshop
localspace_list.description: A small workshop with a workbench covered in wood shavings and a few half-finished chairs. Tools hang neatly on the walls, but the room is empty.

localspace_list.name: Great Hall of Whisper Creek
localspace_list.description: A large, high-ceilinged hall with a long oak table and a massive stone fireplace. Tattered tapestries hang on the walls, and the floor is strewn with rushes.

localspace_list.name: Tiny Pantry
localspace_list.description: A cramped pantry with shelves lined with jars of preserves and dried herbs. A single candle stub sits on a small table.

localspace_list.name: Cozy Closet
localspace_list.description: A tiny, windowless closet with a single wooden chair and a stack of old blankets. The air smells of lavender and dust.

localspace_list.name: Smoky Kitchen
localspace_list.description: A warm kitchen with a large hearth, copper pots hanging overhead, and a wooden table scarred from years of use. A cook moves quietly among the steam and fire.

localspace_list.name: Tiny Guard Post
localspace_list.description: A cramped stone room with a narrow arrow slit window. A single stool and a spear rest against the wall, and a watchman stands at the slit, peering out.

prompt_text: hanging out here in the village
prompt_label: prompt=4/154 "hanging out here in the village"

localspace_list.name: Community Garden Shed
localspace_list.description: A small, tidy wooden shed filled with gardening tools, pots, and bags of soil. Shelves line the walls, and a workbench sits under a dusty window.

localspace_list.name: Village Well
localspace_list.description: A tiny stone well with a rusted crank and a bucket. The surrounding ground is packed earth, and ivy creeps up the sides.

localspace_list.name: Old Miller's Cottage
localspace_list.description: A cozy, small cottage with a low ceiling, a stone fireplace, and worn wooden furniture. A single bed and a hearth occupy the main room.

localspace_list.name: Herbalist's Stall
localspace_list.description: A small covered stall with wooden counters displaying dried herbs, jars of salves, and hanging bundles. A few stools sit nearby.

localspace_list.name: Village Green Tavern
localspace_list.description: A large, lively common room with high rafters, long oak tables, and a broad stone hearth. Barrels line one wall, and lanterns cast warm light.

localspace_list.name: Market Square
localspace_list.description: A broad, open plaza with cobblestones, a central fountain, and wooden stalls shuttered for the night. Benches and flower beds border the area.

localspace_list.name: Orchard Grove
localspace_list.description: A medium-sized orchard of apple and pear trees, with neat rows and a small stone well at the center. Grass and wildflowers cover the ground.

localspace_list.name: Potter's Workshop
localspace_list.description: A small, cluttered workshop with a potter's wheel, shelves of clay vessels, and a kiln in the corner. Dust and clay shavings cover the floor.

localspace_list.name: Chapel of the Green
localspace_list.description: A medium chapel with wooden pews, a simple altar, and stained glass windows depicting harvest scenes. Candles flicker in iron holders.

localspace_list.name: Bell Tower Base
localspace_list.description: A tiny, cramped chamber at the base of the bell tower, with a rope hanging through a hole in the ceiling and a single wooden bench.

localspace_list.name: Village Livery
localspace_list.description: A medium stable with several stalls, hay bales stacked high, and tack hanging on the walls. A central aisle leads to a rear paddock.

prompt_text: i am wandering through the town
prompt_label: prompt=5/154 "i am wandering through the town"

localspace_list.name: Collapsed Maintenance Shed
localspace_list.description: A collapsed wooden shed, its roof caved in and walls splintered. Overgrown with moss and vines, it is clearly unsafe to enter.

localspace_list.name: Sealed Root Cellar
localspace_list.description: A small, stone-lined root cellar entrance, its heavy wooden door bolted and chained shut. The ground around it is damp and sunken.

localspace_list.name: Ruined Lodge Foundation
localspace_list.description: The crumbling stone foundation of a large lodge, now filled with debris and tangled brush. Only the lower walls remain, too unstable to explore.

localspace_list.name: Tiny Birdhouse
localspace_list.description: A small, weathered birdhouse perched on a post, its entrance hole sealed with cobwebs. It is too small and fragile for any human entry.

localspace_list.name: Blocked Workshop Entrance
localspace_list.description: A medium-sized workshop door, completely blocked by a fallen tree and piled rubble. The structure behind it is dark and inaccessible.

localspace_list.name: Sealed Storage Shed
localspace_list.description: A small, windowless shed with a rusted padlock and boards nailed across the door. The wood is warped and the interior is unreachable.

localspace_list.name: Collapsed Well House
localspace_list.description: A tiny well house with a collapsed roof, the well inside filled with stones and dirt. The structure is too dangerous to approach closely.

localspace_list.name: Flooded Pump Station
localspace_list.description: A small pump station, its door ajar but the interior completely submerged in murky water. Entry is impossible without draining the space.

localspace_list.name: Abandoned Greenhouse
localspace_list.description: A medium-sized greenhouse with shattered glass panes and a twisted metal frame. The interior is choked with dead plants and debris, impassable.

localspace_list.name: Caved-In Tool Shed
localspace_list.description: A tiny tool shed, its roof collapsed inward, burying the floor under dirt and broken timber. No entry is possible.

localspace_list.name: Sealed Bunker Hatch
localspace_list.description: A small, steel hatch set into the ground, welded shut and covered with rust. The surrounding earth shows no signs of recent disturbance.

localspace_list.name: Ruined Guest Cabin
localspace_list.description: A large cabin with a collapsed second story and walls leaning at dangerous angles. The interior is filled with rotting wood and debris.

localspace_list.name: Blocked Chimney Base
localspace_list.description: A tiny stone chimney base, its flue completely clogged with bricks and mortar. The surrounding hearth is sealed with a metal plate.

localspace_list.name: Sealed Utility Closet
localspace_list.description: A small utility closet door, painted over and nailed shut. The hinges are rusted solid, and the space behind it is inaccessible.

localspace_list.name: Collapsed Storage Barn
localspace_list.description: A medium-sized barn with a caved-in roof and walls bowed outward. Hay and broken beams fill the interior, making it impassable.

localspace_list.name: Flooded Cistern
localspace_list.description: A small, circular cistern with a broken lid, revealing dark, stagnant water. The water level is too high and the space too confined to enter.

localspace_list.name: Ruined Workshop
localspace_list.description: A medium-sized workshop with a collapsed wall and a sagging roof. Tools and debris are scattered under a layer of dirt and leaves.

localspace_list.name: Sealed Ice House
localspace_list.description: A small, earth-covered ice house with a heavy wooden door barred from the outside. The interior is dark and sealed tight.

localspace_list.name: Tiny Doghouse
localspace_list.description: A tiny, weathered doghouse with a broken roof and a floor covered in mud. It is far too small for a person to enter.

localspace_list.name: Small Bird Nesting Box
localspace_list.description: A small, wooden nesting box attached to a tree, its entrance hole plugged with twigs and moss. It is only accessible to birds.

localspace_list.name: Main Lodge Hall
localspace_list.description: A grand, two-story lodge hall with a high vaulted ceiling, a massive stone fireplace, and large windows overlooking the pines. A lone caretaker tidies the room.

localspace_list.name: Tiny Supply Closet
localspace_list.description: A cramped supply closet with shelves holding a few dusty lanterns and coils of rope. The space is barely large enough to stand in.

localspace_list.name: Small Craft Room
localspace_list.description: A cozy craft room with a wooden workbench, half-finished baskets, and shelves of dried herbs. Sunlight filters through a single small window.

localspace_list.name: Small Boathouse
localspace_list.description: A small boathouse with a single rowboat tied to a wooden dock. The air smells of lake water and old wood.

localspace_list.name: Medium Dining Hall
localspace_list.description: A spacious dining hall with long oak tables and a large hearth at one end. The room is quiet and empty, with place settings still laid out.

localspace_list.name: Small Kitchen
localspace_list.description: A functional kitchen with cast-iron stoves, wooden counters, and hanging pots. The room is clean but unoccupied.

localspace_list.name: Tiny Pantry
localspace_list.description: A tiny pantry lined with shelves of canned goods and jars of preserves. The space is narrow and dimly lit.

localspace_list.name: Small Reading Nook
localspace_list.description: A small, sunlit nook with a worn armchair and a bookshelf filled with old novels. A single window looks out onto the forest.

localspace_list.name: Tiny Fishing Shack
localspace_list.description: A tiny shack with a single fishing rod propped against the wall and a bucket of bait on the floor. It smells of damp earth and fish.

localspace_list.name: Small Game Room
localspace_list.description: A small game room with a billiard table, a dartboard, and a few wooden chairs. The room is tidy and silent.

localspace_list.name: Small Laundry Room
localspace_list.description: A small laundry room with a stone basin, a hand-cranked wringer, and lines of drying cloth. The air is warm and damp.

localspace_list.name: Medium Library
localspace_list.description: A medium-sized library with tall bookshelves, a rolling ladder, and several leather armchairs. Dust motes float in the slanted afternoon light.

localspace_list.name: Small Bathhouse
localspace_list.description: A small bathhouse with a wooden tub, a bench, and a small stove for heating water. Towels hang neatly on hooks.

localspace_list.name: Small Observatory
localspace_list.description: A small observatory with a brass telescope aimed at a gap in the trees. A star chart is pinned to the wall.

localspace_list.name: Small Guard Post
localspace_list.description: A small guard post with a narrow window overlooking the path. A single figure stands watch, silhouetted against the glass.

localspace_list.name: Tiny Bell Tower
localspace_list.description: A tiny bell tower with a single bronze bell and a worn rope. A lone attendant stands near the railing, gazing out over the pines.

localspace_list.name: Small Infirmary
localspace_list.description: A small infirmary with a cot, a cabinet of medicines, and a washbasin. A quiet figure sits in a chair by the window.

localspace_list.name: Medium Chapel
localspace_list.description: A medium-sized chapel with wooden pews, a simple altar, and stained glass windows depicting forest scenes. A solitary worshipper kneels in the front row.

localspace_list.name: Tiny Hermit's Hut
localspace_list.description: A tiny hut with a single cot, a small stove, and a shelf of dried food. A lone occupant sits by the fire, stirring a pot.
